'''Bor Gracus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] and the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

==Biography==
He attended the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]] in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] on behalf of both the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and his homeworld. He was in league with Senator [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], who favored him due to the [[Sluis Van Shipyards]]. He was succeeded as senator by [[Corlissi Ludar]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] states that, before entering the Senate, Gracus served as an aide to [[Ranulph Tarkin/Legends|Ranulph Tarkin]]. This may be a mistake, given that their planets were in different sectors.

==Appearances==
